# Sash.Ai Forge

> Sash.Ai Forge takes an AI startup idea from first conversation to a live, launched product in 6 weeks. Founder brings the idea, we discuss, build with them, and launch. Built for non-technical founders. Senior AI-native CTO included. Predictable, milestone-based pricing.

## Core promise
- **6 weeks. Idea discussion to launch.** One continuous engagement, no vendor chains, no hand-offs.

## The 5-step journey (from idea to launch)
- [Step 1 — Discuss the idea](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#journey): We sit with you, pressure-test the idea, sharpen the thesis.
- [Step 2 — Architect & scope](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#journey): AI architecture spec, product scope locked, milestones agreed.
- [Step 3 — Build together](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#journey): Backend, AI pipelines, frontend. Weekly demos. You in the loop.
- [Step 4 — Launch](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#journey): Production deploy, brand live, first users, investor intros begin.
- [Step 5 — Stay on as tech partner](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#journey): Post-launch shipping, infra, hiring — as long as needed.

## What you walk out with
- A live, production-grade AI product
- A brand (logo, identity, site, socials)
- Investor + customer intros from our network

## How we show up
- [How we show up](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#partnership): Co-founder mindset, predictable budget, skin in the game
- [Honest comparison vs alternatives](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#comparison): tech co-founder, agency, no-code
- [The 45-day plan](https://sovitgarg.github.io/sash_ai_forge/#plan): Week-level cadence

## Who it's for
- Non-technical founders (first-time or repeat) launching AI-native startups
- Bootstrapped-to-seed stage, India + global
- Founders who value speed and completeness over consultant hours
- Founders who don't have months to wait

## Team
- Biddappa Muthappa — CEO, Co-founder — "I'll be in your investor meetings."
- Shabareesh Raj — Chief AI Officer, Co-founder — "I architect your AI system. I don't delegate it."
- Sameer Dhanranjani — Strategic Advisor — "I've built this playbook before. I know where the traps are."

## Engagement models
- Milestone-based, fixed-price per deliverable — predictable budget, no surprise invoices
- Cash + equity blends available for bootstrapped founders on a selective basis
- 100% IP ownership stays with the founder
- Partnership ethos — we challenge, propose, own outcomes with you; not blind execution

## Additional services (priced separately, on request)
These are NOT part of the core 6-week build. Available for founders who also need them:
- Company registration (India Pvt Ltd/LLP, Delaware C-Corp, Singapore, UAE)
- Trademark & IP filing
- Compliance & ops (GST, ROC, bank, payroll, contracts)
- Hiring & team (founding engineer, AI engineer, product)
- Fundraising support (deck, data room, intros, term-sheet reviews)
- Growth & GTM (landing experiments, founder-led sales, paid setup)

AIxplora Technologies Pvt Ltd, Bengaluru, India
